title: Notify me when there is no Updates after some time
excerpt:

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
In our process the equipment in maintenance services need to be updated constantly by our technicians. There is so many equipments in work process, so i need Monday to tell me when there is no updates on any of them.
Can i perform that kind of automation?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @hlopezvc

I don’t think that is possible out-of-the-box. I suggest to create a “last updated” column and use General Caster to cast the difference between “last updated” and NOW() into a numbers column. The you can use:

image1022×129 10.1 KB

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @basdebruin its the best way to achieve this… at least for now
